repos.description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Gemini CLI & Hermes Agent. Only official website: ccswitch.io
an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM
Open-source, community-driven agent harness
Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI personal assistant infrastructure, any OS, any platform — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀
Search infrastructure for AI
Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.
Incremental engine for long horizon agents 🌟 Star if you like it!
All-in-one LLM CLI tool featuring Shell Assistant, Chat-REPL, RAG, AI Tools & Agents, with access to OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, and more.
⚙️🦀 Build modular and scalable LLM Applications in Rust
Coding Agent Harness
Plano is an AI-native proxy and data plane for agentic apps — with built-in orchestration, safety, observability, and smart LLM routing so you stay focused on your agents core logic.
HelixDB is an OLTP graph-vector database built in Rust.

Multi-agent AI orchestration platform for automation, workflows, and developer tools. Golutra transforms Codex, Claude Code, and OpenClaw into a unified agent system with parallel execution, task orchestration, long-running workflows, and AI productivity workspace.
A portable open-source operating system for agents. ~6 ms coldstarts, 32x cheaper than sandboxes. Powered by WebAssembly and V8 isolates.
A portable accelerated SQL query, search, and LLM-inference engine, written in Rust, for data-grounded AI apps and agents.

A secure persistent personal agent server in Rust. One binary, sandboxed execution, multi-provider LLMs, voice, memory, Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, Teams, and MCP tools. Secure by design, runs on your hardware.

Control what your AI can see. LeanCTX (Lean Context) is the context intelligence layer for AI agents — one local Rust binary that decides what they read, remembers what they learn, guards what they touch, and proves what they save. 60–90% fewer tokens as the receipt. 76 MCP tools, 30+ agents, local-first.
All-in-one platform for search, recommendations, RAG, and analytics offered via API
Manage multiple Claude Code, OpenCode agents from either TUI or Web for easy access on mobile. Also supports Mistral Vibe, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Pi.dev, Copilot CLI, Factory Droid Coding.
Low latency web data collector
EdegQuake 🌋 High-performance GraphRAG inspired from LightRag written in Rust; Transform documents into intelligent knowledge graphs for superior retrieval and generation
🦖 Serverless AI Agent Framework with Geo-distributed Edge AI Infra.
Ship your code, on autopilot. An open source agent that lives on your machines 24/7 and keeps your apps running. 🦀
Golem Cloud is the agent-native platform for building AI agents and distributed applications that never lose state, never duplicate work, and never require you to build infrastructure.
Fast, local-first web content extraction for LLMs. Scrape, crawl, extract structured data — all from Rust. CLI, REST API, and MCP server.
Minimal coding agent written in Rust, optimized for memory footprint and performance
Distributed AI/LLM for the people. Share compute privately or publicly to power your agents and chat.
Open-source AI agent harness in native Rust — GUI, CLI, headless, and webapp from one binary. Multi-provider, MCP, skills, plugins, agent teams.
A desktop multi-agent harness built with Rust, Tauri, and React, powered by langgraph-rust.

BitFun is a desktop-grade Agent runtimeand a ready-to-use suite of desktop Agent applications.with built-in Code Agent 、 Cowork Agent、Computer Use. It has memory, personality, and the ability to evolve over time
🦭跨端交接、越用越懂你的桌面 AI 助手——也能服务化常驻、跑在云上 | Desktop AI that hands off across your devices and gets to know you better — also runs headless on a NAS or in the cloud
Open Source Autonomous Software Development System
AI-native workspace for local shells and remote machines.Zero Electron, zero OpenSSL, zero telemetry, and no app subscription.
The self-improving all channels AI agent. Self-healing. Fully autonomous. Single Rust binary.
Agents daemon that hides nothing
Fast, streaming indexing, query, and agentic LLM applications in Rust
VT Code is an open-source coding agent with LLM-native code understanding and robust shell safety. Supports multiple LLM providers with automatic failover and efficient context management.
A  multi-agent framework written in Rust that enables you to build, deploy, and coordinate multiple intelligent agents
A PBX written by rust
The open source Unity Dev Agent
Empower the Shell to think. Evolve Operations.
Safe runtime for autonomous on-chain AI agents: isolated sandboxes, Library skills, encrypted secrets, and OKX read-only security checks.
TUI and CLI for browsing AI models, benchmarks, coding agents, and statuses for AI providers.

Groundhog's primary purpose is to teach people how Cursor and all these other coding agents work under the hood. If you understand how these coding assistants work from first principles, then you can drive these tools harder (or perhaps make your own!).
A local control plane for AI agents — see what they do, approve what matters, keep secrets out. Rust + Tauri + Chrome MV3.
Next-Gen AI-Aware Git. Auditable sandbox, prompt-aware commits, 95% less token waste, 3.5x richer PR brief, 1.8x faster multi-agent loops.

Keep your AI coding agents around. Launch Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Pi Agent, and more from one place — side by side, connected, reachable, and ready to work across web, mobile, and messaging.
Let AI agents message, watch, and spawn each other across terminals. Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity CLI, Cursor CLI, OpenCode, Kilo, Pi, Kimi
Secure runtime to sandbox AI agent tasks. Run untrusted code in isolated WebAssembly environments.
The missing linter and lsp for AI coding assistants. Validate CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, hooks, MCP. Plugin for all major IDEs included, with autofixes.
Blazing-fast LLM inference in pure Rust. No PyTorch and Python runtime.

Fast, cross-platform, real-time token usage tracker and cost monitor for Gemini CLI / Claude Code / Codex CLI / Qwen Code / Cline / Roo Code / Kilo Code / GitHub Copilot / OpenCode / Pi Agent / Piebald.
An open-source LLM router that optimize your agent for cost and performance — with every run.

Fast, lightweight Firecrawl alternative in Rust. Web scraper, crawler & search API with MCP server for AI agents. Drop-in Firecrawl-compatible API (/v1/scrape, /v1/crawl, /v1/search). 2.3x faster than Tavily, 1.5x faster than Firecrawl in 1K-URL benchmarks. 6 MB RAM, single binary. Self-host or use managed cloud.
A SIP/WebRTC voice agent
Cognitive memory database for AI agents — consolidates duplicates, detects contradictions, fades stale memories via temporal decay. Rust, AGPL, ships as library / MCP server / HTTP cluster.
The switchboard for the agent era. Per-channel isolation, encrypted credential vault, per-session hash-chained audit log. Single static Rust binary.

Give your agent a proper IDE and OS. The sensorimotor cortex for coding agents (OpenCode + Pi), part of CortexKit: symbol-aware edits, semantic search, code health, fast grep/glob, bash compression, background tasks, PTY.
Pragmatic AI Labs MCP Agent Toolkit - An MCP Server designed to make code with agents more deterministic
Code Mode inspired local sandboxed MCP Gateway - collapses N servers x M tools into 2 tools (~1,000 tokens)

Hook-based token compressor for 5 AI CLI hosts (Claude Code, Copilot CLI, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI). Up to 95% bash compression, signature-mode for code reads, cross-call dedup, MCP server, self-teaching protocol. Zero runtime deps.
Agent orchestration & security template featuring MCP tool building, agent2agent workflows, mechanistic interpretability on sleeper agents, and agent integration via CLI wrappers
Skill-kits is a zero-dependency, single-binary AI Agent Skills management tool for any LLM and multi-agent workflows.
🦀 A Pure Rust Framework For Building AGI.
Rust port of the pi agent harness — coding agent + LLM runtime stack

The context intelligence layer for AI coding agents. Compressing noise, routing content to the right strategy, preserving session state across compactions, and surfacing the files that actually matter.
Build an AI agent harness in Rust, from a minimal loop to tools, subagents, memory, teams, worktrees,   MCP, and typed tool routing.
Open-source voice agent OS. Rust runtime, AI-driven builder, sub second latency. Self-host everything.
multi-depth architecture views for code understanding and generation in extremely fast speed
The issue tracker your AI agents are missing. Think Linear or Jira, but for your Claude Code..

AURA is an agentic harness that turns an LLM model into a reliable, autonomous service capable of executing real SRE work. AURA provides the guardrails, API servers, state management, authentication, streaming, error handling, and tool integrations necessary to run AI SRE agents safely in production.
mcp & skill scanner that scans any mcp server or skills for indirect attack vectors and security or configuration vulnerabilities
Open-source AI gateway written in Rust, with token compression for Claude Code, Codex... and any other LLM client.

Alephant is an open-source AI Agent Gateway for routing, tracking, and controlling LLM usage across AI agents, members, and workflows, and for publishing agent capabilities as paid endpoints with x402 and MPP payment rails.
LLM reasoning outer weights memory layer to sync any agents you have

Complete open-source AI collaboration suite and multi-agent platform featuring LLM orchestration, automation, and virtual assistants. Scales seamlessly from small deployments to large enterprise environments.
Token-efficient navigation substrate for AI coding agents. Index code once and retrieve only the symbols you need.
High-performance capability authorization engine for AI agents. Cryptographically attenuated warrants, task-scoped authority, verifiable offline. Rust core.
🦀 Open-source alternative to Claude Code, built from scratch in Rust. Agentic coding CLI — thinks, plans, and executes with any LLM. Compatible with Claude Code workflows.
Agentic runtime in Rust — persistent, supervised agents. Self-hosted, local-first, zero telemetry. Apache 2.0.
AI-powered repository agent for GitHub, GitLab, Gitea, Azure DevOps. Issue triage, PR analysis, merge queue, notifications, dashboard, backup. Self-hosted, multi-provider.

EdgeCrab 🦀 A Super Powerful Personal Assistant inspired by NousHermes and OpenClaw — Rust-native, blazing-fast terminal UI, ReAct tool loop, multi-provider LLM support, ACP protocol, gateway adapters, and built-in security hardening.
Secure on device personal agents
Desktop IDE with built-in AI coding agents
Single CLI to monitor LLM provider usage across Codex, Claude, Gemini, Cursor, and Copilot: remaining quota, rate limits, and cost tracking in one place
Multi-language agent runtime for execution scope management, lifecycle events, and middleware on tool and LLM calls.
Ares is an autonomous security operations platform where LLM-driven red and blue team agents operate against each other on live infrastructure, enabling realistic evaluation of attack and defense.
Isolated Linux desktop workspaces for AI agents — a hidden, agent-owned desktop and browser over MCP, so an agent can do GUI and web work without touching your real desktop.
Zero-code LLM security & observability proxy. Real-time prompt injection detection, PII scanning, and cost control for OpenAI-compatible APIs. Built in Rust.
Security Scan orchestrator for AI Agents 🎯
A secure, stable Rust alternative to openclaw/moltbot/clawdbot
Universal memory runtime for AI agents
Simple, Composable, High-Performance, Safe and Web3 Friendly AI Agents and LazAI Gateway for Everyone

MCP server that exposes a V8 JavaScript runtime as a tool for AI agents like Claude and Cursor. Supports persistent heap snapshots via S3 or local filesystem, and is ready for integration with modern AI development environments.

Rust terminal coding agent, Claude Code compatible — your .claude/ config just works. Multi-LLM, streaming Markdown TUI, 95%+ prompt cache, MCP & ACP support, background agents. Built entirely by AI via Nobody Coding.
One-click knowledge system for documents, internal bots, and AI agents

A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.
258 KB WASM runtime for Needle a 26M-parameter tool-calling transformer. Runs in browser, Cloudflare Workers, and Node.js. No backend required.
Useful demo applications for Deepgram Voice AI APIs, using the Rust language! 🦀
Fast local Rust scanner for AI-agent prompt injection, credential leaks, exfiltration, and risky tool calls
When Claude Code hits its rate limit, Relay hands off your full session context to Codex, Gemini, Aider, or 5 other agents — so your work never stops.
Autonomous AI agent orchestrator — run multi-model dev teams (Claude, Gemini, GPT) with YAML workflows, daemon scheduling, and MCP integration. 100% Rust.
Proof layer for AI agents. Cryptographically verify every action.
Code-quality feedback for LLM coding agents
Android AI agent app. Kotlin + Rust via UniFFI.

Context Limiter & Output Vetter for context bloat. It is a highly specialized, structure-aware JSON built specifically to intercept and compress MCP responses before they annihilate your LLM's context window.

Cognitive memory engine for AI agents — temporal decay, contradiction detection, autonomous consolidation, knowledge graph, ANN recall via HNSW. Embeddable Rust library with Python bindings; powers yantrikdb-server (HTTP gateway, MCP server, openraft cluster). AGPL.
Rust AI agent orchestration platform with App Server, rules, skills, GC, and observability.
SochDB is a high-performance embedded, ACID-compliant vector database purpose-built for AI agents and memory
One YAML = Any Agent. Declarative AI agent framework in Rust.
🦀 A high-performance code agent written in Rust, combining the best features of WCGW for maximum efficiency and semantic capabilities.
Agent and LLM API performance monitoring via network packet probe. Measures performance of OpenClaw, Claude, Codex, DeepAgents and more — deployed on the provider side, no SDK changes required.
CloudLLM is a batteries-included Rust toolkit for building intelligent agents with LLM integration, multi-protocol tool support, and multi-agent orchestration.

rUvOS — the agentic operating system. A single static Rust binary that runs as an MCP server, giving Claude Code persistent memory, resumable signed sessions, multi-agent orchestration, a knowledge graph, safety guardrails, and a signed audit trail. Zero Node.js, zero SQLite, zero daemon.

Local proxy that compresses your LLM API requests so you pay less, with no change to the answers. Trims wasted tokens from prompts, history, tool output, and code before they're sent: -31% input / -74% output, measured live. Any provider, no extra model calls, single Rust binary.

The most intelligent context optimization engine for coding agents. Code-aware AST parsing across 17 languages. Command rewriting. Test, build, and git output compression. Token budget cascading. Built in Rust.
Dynamic Intent Resolution Grounding Engine
🧬 The adaptive model routing system for exploration and exploitation.
🦅 Open-source AI agent runtime in Rust — Self-hostable with persistent memory, self-improving skills, MCP support, built-in cron, multi-platform messaging & production gateway.
AI-powered shell assistant that helps you execute commands and file operations through natural language.
Memory for AI agents that never leaves your device. Local-first, end-to-end-encrypted, zero-telemetry memory engine (Rust, MCP) — gives Claude & any MCP client persistent cross-session memory.

Multi-provider AI agent CLI written in Rust
A state-based autonomous agent framework. Crafting digital entities with non-linear cognitive memory and self-evolving emotions. (Work in Progress)
Stop rebuilding your agentic setup every time. Define it in YAML, run it with one command, and share it like a recipe 📜

Native terminal workspace for running Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Pi and any coding agent in parallel — see who's thinking, who's waiting, who's done. Rust + GPUI · Linux & macOS today, Windows in progress.
Agent OS in Rust — one binary, 37 agents, 26 LLM providers, 37 channels (Telegram/Discord/Slack...), MCP server, A2A protocol, 120+ API endpoints, web dashboard
Persistent cognitive graph memory for AI agents — facts, decisions, reasoning chains, corrections. 16 query types, sub-millisecond. Rust core + Python SDK + MCP server.
Skill-first AI coding agent in Rust — injects only the context your task needs. No prompt bloat. Single binary, no runtime.
Cut AI coding agent costs 15-62% and time 39-64%. Structural code indexing that gives Claude Code, Codex & Copilot the right context in one shot — no LLM, no embeddings, no API keys.

Governed AI agent runtime with a local-first desktop app + CLI. Chat with any model (Claude, OpenAI, Groq, Ollama, LM Studio); every action passes Intent → Proposal → Commit through signed capability writs, risk-gated approvals, and a replayable hash-chained ledger. Watch it think in the Mind graph. Cognition proposes; the runtime governs.
Checkpoint-native rollout infrastructure for agentic RL.
The open-source safety layer for AI agents — block unsafe tool calls, require approval, enforce budgets, audit, replay.

High-integrity backbone for agentic reasoning, deterministic coordination, and associative memory. One binary. Total autonomy.
Agentic AI server in Rust. Multi-provider LLM routing, tool calling, RAG, MCP, multi-tenant workflows.
Tmux sidebar for vibe coding. Manage sessions and monitor agents at a glance

A Rust-first autonomous AI agent runtime and CLI code editor. Built on SenAgentOS, it applies Harness Engineering to code engineering: orchestrate LLM agents for autonomous exploration, refactoring, testing, and debugging. Performance, stability, security – fully harnessed.
Local-first AI paper reader with vectorless PDF RAG, page/bbox citations, OCR/TSR table evidence, PDF translation, and local Codex/Claude agents.
Pure-Rust runtime for serving, local agents, On-Policy Distillation, and evaluation. infer is the OpenAI-compatible serving binary; arle is the unified front door.

Headless agent orchestrator with deterministic state machine — processes a bead queue, dispatches to any LLM CLI, handles every outcome. Rust.
Structured, git-native knowledge your AI coding agent writes over MCP — and that uses git to flag itself stale when the   code moves. Local-first, no SaaS.
软件、补丁、NixOS 模块与 AI 编码助手的技能合集。
Lionclaw is a local control plane for AI coding agents. It runs AI agents as durable, auditable workers with explicit state, skills, channels, schedules, and bounded permissions.
Open-source infrastructure for groups of AI agents — identity, capability, accountability, and norms. Framework-agnostic.
Geometric agent memory for Grok Build: 8-tool lean contract, harness injection at wake, session handoff. 66 MCP tools. Not a vector DB. Rust + MCP.
A local privacy firewall for AI agents.
Computer-use, but for the iPhone — AI agents (and your browser) see and drive a real phone over macOS iPhone Mirroring. Low-latency WebRTC video, near-native touch, HTTP API + MCP. Rust, self-hosted.

Fast hybrid code search built for AI agents
Solana-native AI agent payment infrastructure. AI agents pay for LLM API calls with USDC-SPL on Solana via the x402 protocol.
Bamboo — a local-first AI agent runtime in Rust: tasks, tools, memory, MCP, workflows and schedules behind an HTTP + SSE API. The self-contained execution core powering the Bodhi desktop agent.
dk — CLI for Dakera self-hosted AI agent memory. Manage memories, namespaces, vectors, knowledge graphs, and sessions.

Local-first Rust agent cockpit — route, run, replay, rewind.

Your AI never leaves your laptop. Claudette is a personal AI assistant and coding agent that runs entirely on local hardware - REPL, fullscreen TUI, one-shot CLI, and a Telegram bot, all driving one local model through Ollama or LM Studio. No cloud brain. No API key. No subscription. No telemetry. One Rust binary.

A terminal-native AI agent runtime built in Rust. Interactive chat, parallel agent orchestration, and autonomous supervision — one binary, 70K lines, 1,074 tests.

A capability-based operating layer for long-running autonomous software engineering agents. Rust daemon, signed capabilities, append-only audit, drift-aware memory, fail-closed sandbox dispatch, commit-scoped provenance.

Local-first AI assistant runtime with native desktop, self-hosted gateway, MCP, memory, tools, tasks, and BYO models. Built in Rust.

A Rust-based Telegram AI assistant powered by OpenRouter LLM with built-in sandboxed tools, scheduling, persistent memory, and MCP server integration.
Open-source autonomous AI assistant with 5-tier security, 62 tools, 14 LLM providers. Written in Rust. Single binary.
Rust library for SIP calling and RTP media — register with a trunk or accept calls as a SIP server. Decoded PCM audio via crossbeam channels.
AI governance infrastructure for agentic systems. Rust library behind systemprompt.io — MCP, A2A, OAuth2, audit trails, compile-time extensions. Evaluate with systemprompt-template.
Agent harness for hot-reloading function evolution in Rust.

Desktop AI coding-agent platform (Tauri + Rust) for racing, evaluating & orchestrating LLMs across Anthropic and open models (Kimi, MiniMax, DeepSeek, GLM, Qwen) — with a deterministic Axolotl Civilization arena the models compete in.

Pure-Rust async runtime for LLM agents. Multi-provider (Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama), tool-capable end-to-end, structured permissions, real MCP support, USD cost tracking, Files API, optional FS+search tool pack.
acrawl — LLM-powered web crawler. Describe what you want in plain English, get structured data back. Single Rust binary, 25 providers, MCP server built-in.

Kernel contract for the Life Agent OS — canonical types, runtime ports, event taxonomy, policy gates. The genome that all subsystems implement.
Shellless and rust only llm agent

Evidence-first memory for Claude Code, Codex, and the terminal. Kimetsu sits beside your AI agent, watches what actually solves problems, remembers it, and feeds the high-signal context back so the next run starts where the last one left off.
LDP — LLM Delegate Protocol: identity-aware communication for multi-agent LLM systems

Sego - The AI coding agent that learns from every run.
Not a framework. A file format for agent-to-agent handoffs — provenance, parallel safety, and human visibility by design. Model-agnostic. Framework-agnostic. Open spec, MPL-2.0.

An extensible, policy-minded agent harness in pure Rust. Any LLM via one trait. Concurrent tools, policy guardrails, session memory, eval harness, and TUI included.
Inference-aware runtime for AI coding agents that reuses execution state to reduce repeated reasoning, repo rereads, tool calls, and failure loops.

Cloud-backed persistence (S3-compatible) protects your data from flash wear and reflashes via transparent write-through replication. Works with any LLM provider.
🐔 An open-source, distributed AI agent farm OS. Raise, train, and trade autonomous agents on your own hardware.
Long-term memory for AI coding assistants. Rust CLI with semantic search, Agent Skill integration, and local deployment.
A high-performance code intelligence graph for LLMs and AI agents. Sub-second structural queries, impact analysis, and cross-repo API contracts for autonomous coding workflows.
rust core for NPC-Context-Agent-Tool data layer, includes agent kernel, jinx executor, LLM client.

Agentic SpendGuard — audit-chain spend control for LLM agents. KMS-signed decisions, Stripe-style auth/capture ledger, operator approval, multi-tenant. Adapters for Pydantic-AI, LangChain, LangGraph, OpenAI Agents SDK, Microsoft AGT.
Rust toolkit for building LLM agent applications, e.g.: coding agents, assistant CLIs and multi-agent tools.

Desktop AI agent client — multi-agent delegation, long-term memory, MCP, and Skills. Built with Tauri + SvelteKit + Rust.

Local-first codebase retrieval for AI coding agents — zero-token context packets before grep. 60% first-correct-file@5 on SWE-bench Lite (10x naive grep), session learning, edit-impact hooks, auditable receipts.
A desktop app for building, running, and supervising small teams of AI agents. MCP-native tools, shared workspaces, and scheduled automations.
Full Rust SDK for the Gemini Multimodal Live API — wire protocol, agent runtime, and fluent DX in three layered crates.
app for coding agents
A self-hosted cognitive operating system. AI agents as kernel processes. One Rust binary, no runtime dependencies, multi-tenant.

The test suite your MCP server is missing. Tool, resource, agent-loop, schema-drift, compliance, and security tests against any Model Context Protocol server, in CI on every commit. One YAML suite, deterministic cassette replay, multi-model comparison, and LLM-judge evals. Rust, Apache-2.0.
🚀 Build and launch a dynamic multi-agent ecosystem quickly with Swarm Factory, your go-to solution for adaptive AI development.
Build and run local-first agents with customizable MCP tools, safe defaults, and replayable workflows for developers at any skill level.
Enable autonomous AI workflows with a local-first, zero-trust Rust framework for high-performance multi-agent orchestration and deterministic execution.

Self-evolving AI Agent CLI in Rust. 60+ tools for coding, testing, refactoring, trading. Dual-licensed: MIT + Commercial.

~15 ms image-paste into Claude Code, Codex CLI, Aider & other terminal LLM agents on GNOME Wayland. Fixes mutter's surfaceless-client clipboard refusal, kitty's map ctrl+v interception, and tmux's bind -n C-v recursion. MCP server included. MIT.
Agent orchestration framework that manages AI workflows through configuration instead of code. Define tools, memory, providers, and execution flow with portable JSON configs.
